style.background-color: =if(@currentField == 'Created', '#4682DC', if(@currentField == 'Approved', '#FFB900', if(@currentField == 'Printing', '#FF8C00', if(@currentField == 'Completed', '#004E8C', if(@currentField == 'Picked Up', '#009E49', if(@currentField == 'Rejected', '#D13438', if(@currentField == 'Canceled by Student', '#8A8886', if(@currentField == 'Updated', '#00897B', if(@currentField == 'Status Change', '#7B1FA2', if(@currentField == 'File Added', '#0097A7', if(@currentField == 'Comment Added', '#C2185B', if(@currentField == 'Assigned', '#5E35B1', if(@currentField == 'Email Sent', '#0288D1', if(@currentField == 'System', '#546E7A', if(@currentField == 'Student Confirmed', '#512DA8', '#333333')))))))))))))))
